TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-frog_ofad
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: a pakimadho kaku tu ccay a kakimadan u nu pakayniay i wawa.
S.PHON: a pakimaɬ~ɮħo~u kaku tu ʦʦaj a kakimaɬ~ɮan u nu pakajniaj i wawa.
S.FORM: a pakimadho kaku tu ccay a kakimadan u nu pakayniay i wawa.
S.PHON: a pakimaɬ~ɮħo~u kaku tu ʦʦaj a kakimaɬ~ɮan u nu pakajniaj i wawa.
S.TRANSL: 我來說有關小孩子的一個故事.
I will tell a story about a child.

S.FORM: ira ku ccay a wawa.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a wawa.
S.FORM: ira ku ccay a wawa.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩.
There was a child.

S.FORM: ira ku mi patelian nira i talid a takula'.
S.PHON: ira ku mi patəɾian nira i taɾiɬ~ɮ a takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: ira ku mi patelian nira i talid a takula'.
S.PHON: ira ku mi patəɾian nira i taɾiɬ~ɮ a takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻他裝在瓶子裡的青蛙.
There was a frog which he put in a bottle.

S.FORM: sarumi'ami'adhan nira a minengneng.
S.PHON: sarumiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮħan nira a minəŋnəŋ.
S.FORM: sarumi'ami'adhan nira a minengneng.
S.PHON: sarumiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮħan nira a minəŋnəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他每天都看著牠.
He looked at it everyday.

S.FORM: mara'or tu dadaya i mafuti' tahira kaleda'an nira makuliniw nuya takula' a milaliw.
S.PHON: maraʡo~ur tu ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja i mafutiʡ taħira kaɾəɬ~ɮaʡan nira makuɾiniw nuja takuɾaʡ a miɾaɾiw.
S.FORM: mara'or tu dadaya i mafuti' tahira kaleda'an nira makuliniw nuya takula' a milaliw.
S.PHON: maraʡo~ur tu ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja i mafutiʡ taħira kaɾəɬ~ɮaʡan nira makuɾiniw nuja takuɾaʡ a miɾaɾiw.
S.TRANSL: 到晚上睡覺時間,他沈睡的時候,那個青蛙偷偷摸摸地離開.
When it was time to sleep at night and he was asleep, the frog left stealthily.

S.FORM: talipaalal cingra nengnenghan nira kiya talid.
S.PHON: taɾipaaɾaɾ ʦiŋra nəŋnəŋħan nira kija taɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: talipaalal cingra nengnenghan nira kiya talid.
S.PHON: taɾipaaɾaɾ ʦiŋra nəŋnəŋħan nira kija taɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 醒來後,他看了那個瓶子.
When he woke up, he looked at the bottle.

S.FORM: ya maparuay i talid a takula' awa'aytu maaraw ningra.
S.PHON: ja maparuaj i taɾiɬ~ɮ a takuɾaʡ awaʡajtu maaraw niŋra.
S.FORM: ya maparuay i talid a takula' awa'aytu maaraw ningra.
S.PHON: ja maparuaj i taɾiɬ~ɮ a takuɾaʡ awaʡajtu maaraw niŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他沒看到那隻原本裝在瓶子裡的青蛙.
He didn't see the frog which he put in the bottle.

S.FORM: a minengneng talacuwacuwa satu hakiya sa a mikilim cingra.
S.PHON: a minəŋnəŋ taɾaʦuwaʦuwa satu ħakija sa a mikiɾim ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: a minengneng talacuwacuwa satu hakiya sa a mikilim cingra.
S.PHON: a minəŋnəŋ taɾaʦuwaʦuwa satu ħakija sa a mikiɾim ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: cuwacuwa是reduplication,hakiya表「怎麼樣了呢」的擔憂心情用語.
He searched everywhere and wondered what happened to the frog.

S.FORM: nengnengen nira kiya safang nira yapi sapi ala nira tuya takula'.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋən nira kija safaŋ nira japi sapi aɾa nira tuja takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: nengnengen nira kiya safang nira yapi sapi ala nira tuya takula'.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋən nira kija safaŋ nira japi sapi aɾa nira tuja takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 他尋找用來抓青蛙的那個網子.
He looked for the net that he used to catch that frog.

S.FORM: awa'aytu matawma.
S.PHON: awaʡajtu matawma.
S.FORM: awa'aytu matawma.
S.PHON: awaʡajtu matawma.
S.TRANSL: 沒找著.
didn't find .

S.FORM: halu ya wacutu nira a mipadang a mi kilim tuya takula'.
S.PHON: ħaɾu ja waʦutu nira a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ a mi kiɾim tuja takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: halu ya wacutu nira a mipadang a mi kilim tuya takula'.
S.PHON: ħaɾu ja waʦutu nira a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ a mi kiɾim tuja takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 狗也幫忙他找尋那隻青蛙.
His dog helped him look for the frog.

S.FORM: sa hiningen nuya wacu kuya patelian tuya takula' i.
S.PHON: sa ħiniŋən nuja waʦu kuja patəɾian tuja takuɾaʡ i.
S.FORM: sa hiningen nuya wacu kuya patelian tuya takula' i.
S.PHON: sa ħiniŋən nuja waʦu kuja patəɾian tuja takuɾaʡ i.
S.TRANSL: 那個狗望著裝著青蛙的地方.

TRANSL.notes: The dog looked at (the place) where the frog was kept.

S.TRANSL: The dog looked at where the frog was kept.

S.FORM: awa'ay a manengneng nira sadak satu a.
S.PHON: awaʡaj a manəŋnəŋ nira saɬ~ɮak satu a.
S.FORM: awa'ay a manengneng nira sadak satu a.
S.PHON: awaʡaj a manəŋnəŋ nira saɬ~ɮak satu a.
S.TRANSL: 牠沒有看到,他打算出去找.

TRANSL.notes: He didn't see (the frog). (He went) outside.

S.TRANSL: He didn't see . outside.

S.FORM: mahicurcur a mikilim kuya wacu na itira i sasingaran nu luma'.
S.PHON: maħiʦurʦur a mikiɾim kuja waʦu na itira i sasiŋaran nu ɾumaʡ.
S.FORM: mahicurcur a mikilim kuya wacu na itira i sasingaran nu luma'.
S.PHON: maħiʦurʦur a mikiɾim kuja waʦu na itira i sasiŋaran nu ɾumaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗找著找著就從房子的窗戶頭朝前栽了下去.

TRANSL.notes: Looking for (the frog), the dog fell head over heels from the window of the house.

S.TRANSL: Looking for , the dog fell head over heels from the window of the house.

S.FORM: na matiyatu i kuya wawa satu keridhantu nira kuya wacu nira a mi tayra i paputal a mi nengneng.
S.PHON: na matijatu i kuja wawa satu kəriɬ~ɮħantu nira kuja waʦu nira a mi tajra i paputaɾ a mi nəŋnəŋ.
S.FORM: na matiyatu i kuya wawa satu keridhantu nira kuya wacu nira a mi tayra i paputal a mi nengneng.
S.PHON: na matijatu i kuja wawa satu kəriɬ~ɮħantu nira kuja waʦu nira a mi tajra i paputaɾ a mi nəŋnəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 就在那個時候,那個小孩子帶領那隻狗到外面去看.

TRANSL.notes: Then, the child took the dog outside to look (for the frog).

S.TRANSL: Then, the child took the dog outside to look .

S.FORM: tahira cangra i lutuklutukan i.
S.PHON: taħira ʦaŋra i ɾutukɾutukan i.
S.FORM: tahira cangra i lutuklutukan i.
S.PHON: taħira ʦaŋra i ɾutukɾutukan i.
S.TRANSL: 他們到了山林中.
They arrived at a forest.

S.FORM: adihay ku onal a maefer.
S.PHON: aɬ~ɮiħaj ku o~unaɾ a maəfər.
S.FORM: adihay ku onal a maefer.
S.PHON: aɬ~ɮiħaj ku o~unaɾ a maəfər.
S.TRANSL: 很多蜜蜂在飛.
Many bees were flying.

S.FORM: u ma'an kuninian hakiya sa'an cangra saka.
S.PHON: u maʡan kuninian ħakija saʡan ʦaŋra saka.
S.FORM: u ma'an kuninian hakiya sa'an cangra saka.
S.PHON: u maʡan kuninian ħakija saʡan ʦaŋra saka.
S.TRANSL: 這個是什麼,他們如此想.
'What is this?' they thought.

S.FORM: ra'orhan nira manengneng nira ku luma' nu na onal.
S.PHON: raʡo~urħan nira manəŋnəŋ nira ku ɾumaʡ nu na o~unaɾ.
S.FORM: ra'orhan nira manengneng nira ku luma' nu na onal.
S.PHON: raʡo~urħan nira manəŋnəŋ nira ku ɾumaʡ nu na o~unaɾ.
S.TRANSL: 他們接近,他們看到蜂窩.
As they came closer, they saw a beehive.

S.FORM: nengnenghantu nura wacu miawaw a mikalic kalichan nuya wacu.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħantu nura waʦu miawaw a mikaɾiʦ kaɾiʦħan nuja waʦu.
S.FORM: nengnenghantu nura wacu miawaw a mikalic kalichan nuya wacu.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħantu nura waʦu miawaw a mikaɾiʦ kaɾiʦħan nuja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 他隻狗一直看著,不但叫又想爬上去.

TRANSL.notes: The dog looked at (the beehive), barked, and (wanted to) climb (up the tree).

S.TRANSL: The dog looked at , barked, and climb .

S.FORM: ma tefadtu kuya luma' nuya onal saka.
S.PHON: ma təfaɬ~ɮtu kuja ɾumaʡ nuja o~unaɾ saka.
S.FORM: ma tefadtu kuya luma' nuya onal saka.
S.PHON: ma təfaɬ~ɮtu kuja ɾumaʡ nuja o~unaɾ saka.
S.TRANSL: 那個蜂窩掉下來了.
The beehive fell down.

S.FORM: laklak satu a ma efer ku pulong nuya onal tura kilakilangan.
S.PHON: ɾakɾak satu a ma əfər ku puɾo~uŋ nuja o~unaɾ tura kiɾakiɾaŋan.
S.FORM: laklak satu a ma efer ku pulong nuya onal tura kilakilangan.
S.PHON: ɾakɾak satu a ma əfər ku puɾo~uŋ nuja o~unaɾ tura kiɾakiɾaŋan.
S.TRANSL: 所以裡面的的蜜蜂四處飛散,全部的蜜蜂四處飛散在那個樹林中.

TRANSL.notes: (As a result,) the bees flew out and scattered all over the forest.

S.TRANSL: the bees flew out and scattered all over the forest.

S.FORM: na nu iya i ya miheningan nuya wawa tuya epong la'enu a itira a milimed kuya takula' na sa'an ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: na nu ija i ja miħəniŋan nuja wawa tuja əpo~uŋ ɾaʡənu a itira a miɾiməɬ~ɮ kuja takuɾaʡ na saʡan ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.FORM: na nu iya i ya miheningan nuya wawa tuya epong la'enu a itira a milimed kuya takula' na sa'an ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: na nu ija i ja miħəniŋan nuja wawa tuja əpo~uŋ ɾaʡənu a itira a miɾiməɬ~ɮ kuja takuɾaʡ na saʡan ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子觀望的時候,他心想,以為青蛙躲在涵洞裡面.
The child peeked into a hole, thinking that the frog was hiding inside there.

S.FORM: nengnenghan nira.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira.
S.FORM: nengnenghan nira.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira.
S.TRANSL: 他看了.
He looked.

S.FORM: masadasadak u edu ku masadakay nira.
S.PHON: masaɬ~ɮasaɬ~ɮak u əɬ~ɮu ku masaɬ~ɮakaj nira.
S.FORM: masadasadak u edu ku masadakay nira.
S.PHON: masaɬ~ɮasaɬ~ɮak u əɬ~ɮu ku masaɬ~ɮakaj nira.
S.TRANSL: 結果忽然出現一隻老鼠.
A mouse appeared.

S.FORM: paliyawho cingra a mikalic tayra tuya kilang tayrahan nira tuya kilang i.
S.PHON: paɾijawħo~u ʦiŋra a mikaɾiʦ tajra tuja kiɾaŋ tajraħan nira tuja kiɾaŋ i.
S.FORM: paliyawho cingra a mikalic tayra tuya kilang tayrahan nira tuya kilang i.
S.PHON: paɾijawħo~u ʦiŋra a mikaɾiʦ tajra tuja kiɾaŋ tajraħan nira tuja kiɾaŋ i.
S.TRANSL: 他又跑回去爬上那一棵樹.
He went back and climbed up the tree.

S.FORM: awa'ay kuya takula'.
S.PHON: awaʡaj kuja takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: awa'ay kuya takula'.
S.PHON: awaʡaj kuja takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 沒有那隻青蛙.
The frog was not there.

S.FORM: sedak sa'an ku ekung pa cekuk ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: səɬ~ɮak saʡan ku əkuŋ pa ʦəkuk ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.FORM: sedak sa'an ku ekung pa cekuk ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: səɬ~ɮak saʡan ku əkuŋ pa ʦəkuk ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹突然出現,嚇了他一跳.
An owl suddenly appeared and frightened him.

S.FORM: ma tefad na itira tura kilang a makunkun cingra.
S.PHON: ma təfaɬ~ɮ na itira tura kiɾaŋ a makunkun ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: ma tefad na itira tura kilang a makunkun cingra.
S.PHON: ma təfaɬ~ɮ na itira tura kiɾaŋ a makunkun ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他從樹上掉下來.
He fell down from the tree.

S.FORM: uya wacu satu i pakatengiltu cingra tu katefad nuya nuya tamdaw i.
S.PHON: uja waʦu satu i pakatəŋiɾtu ʦiŋra tu katəfaɬ~ɮ nuja nuja tamɬ~ɮaw i.
S.FORM: uya wacu satu i pakatengiltu cingra tu katefad nuya nuya tamdaw i.
S.PHON: uja waʦu satu i pakatəŋiɾtu ʦiŋra tu katəfaɬ~ɮ nuja nuja tamɬ~ɮaw i.
S.TRANSL: 狗聽見他掉下來的聲音.
The dog heard him fall.

S.FORM: cingra sa na haw na miaw'aw' a ya ca cingra tuya onal i.
S.PHON: ʦiŋra sa na ħaw na miawʡawʡ a ja ʦa ʦiŋra tuja o~unaɾ i.
S.FORM: cingra sa na haw na miaw'aw' a ya ca cingra tuya onal i.
S.PHON: ʦiŋra sa na ħaw na miawʡawʡ a ja ʦa ʦiŋra tuja o~unaɾ i.
S.TRANSL: 狗對蜜蜂吠.
barked at the bees.

S.FORM: lawpentu nuya onal cingra a mi law laliw satu cingra.
S.PHON: ɾawpəntu nuja o~unaɾ ʦiŋra a mi ɾaw ɾaɾiw satu ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: lawpentu nuya onal cingra a mi law laliw satu cingra.
S.PHON: ɾawpəntu nuja o~unaɾ ʦiŋra a mi ɾaw ɾaɾiw satu ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 那些蜜蜂開始追他,他就開始跑.

TRANSL.notes: The bees began (chasing) it, and it ran away.

S.TRANSL: The bees began it, and it ran away.

S.FORM: kuya satu ya wawa i mikilim mikilimektu tayra i ongcuongcuyan.
S.PHON: kuja satu ja wawa i mikiɾim mikiɾiməktu tajra i o~uŋʦuo~uŋʦujan.
S.FORM: kuya satu ya wawa i mikilim mikilimektu tayra i ongcuongcuyan.
S.PHON: kuja satu ja wawa i mikiɾim mikiɾiməktu tajra i o~uŋʦuo~uŋʦujan.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩躲到了磐石之中.
The child hid behind the rocks.

S.FORM: ya wacu i mikilimtu tayra i dihif nu fakelokelohan.
S.PHON: ja waʦu i mikiɾimtu tajra i ɬ~ɮiħif nu fakəɾo~ukəɾo~uħan.
S.FORM: ya wacu i mikilimtu tayra i dihif nu fakelokelohan.
S.PHON: ja waʦu i mikiɾimtu tajra i ɬ~ɮiħif nu fakəɾo~ukəɾo~uħan.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗去了石堆的縫隙中躲避.
The dog hid among the rocks.

S.FORM: kecuren nuya ekung cingra.
S.PHON: kəʦurən nuja əkuŋ ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: kecuren nuya ekung cingra.
S.PHON: kəʦurən nuja əkuŋ ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹從高處看見他.
The owl was looking at it.

S.FORM: na matira cingra u kilang kuni hakiya sa tuya pitatuyan nira.
S.PHON: na matira ʦiŋra u kiɾaŋ kuni ħakija sa tuja pitatujan nira.
S.FORM: na matira cingra u kilang kuni hakiya sa tuya pitatuyan nira.
S.PHON: na matira ʦiŋra u kiɾaŋ kuni ħakija sa tuja pitatujan nira.

TRANSL.notes: 他(小孩)在這樣之下,以為自己所握的東西是樹枝.

S.TRANSL: 他 在這樣之下,以為自己所握的東西是樹枝.
He held on to what he thought was a piece of wood.

S.FORM: nengnenghan ku malunem.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan ku maɾunəm.
S.FORM: nengnenghan ku malunem.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan ku maɾunəm.
S.TRANSL: 看了之後原來是隻鹿.
He saw that it was a deer.

S.FORM: na uya na nu i cula' hantu nuya malunem cingra a matamurum tayra i 'apilis nu lutuk.
S.PHON: na uja na nu i ʦuɾaʡ ħantu nuja maɾunəm ʦiŋra a matamurum tajra i ʡapiɾis nu ɾutuk.
S.FORM: na uya na nu i cula' hantu nuya malunem cingra a matamurum tayra i 'apilis nu lutuk.
S.PHON: na uja na nu i ʦuɾaʡ ħantu nuja maɾunəm ʦiŋra a matamurum tajra i ʡapiɾis nu ɾutuk.
S.TRANSL: 就在當時,他被那隻鹿扛著,到了山的峭壁.
At that moment, the deer carried it to the cliff of the mountains.

S.FORM: tayra i 'apilis nu lutuk i fahekulhan nuya malunem kuya wawa.
S.PHON: tajra i ʡapiɾis nu ɾutuk i faħəkuɾħan nuja maɾunəm kuja wawa.
S.FORM: tayra i 'apilis nu lutuk i fahekulhan nuya malunem kuya wawa.
S.PHON: tajra i ʡapiɾis nu ɾutuk i faħəkuɾħan nuja maɾunəm kuja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 被鹿扛著到達山的峭壁, 小孩子被甩出去.
At the cliff of the mountain, the deer flung the child.

S.FORM: halu wacu a matefad tayra i nanum.
S.PHON: ħaɾu waʦu a matəfaɬ~ɮ tajra i nanum.
S.FORM: halu wacu a matefad tayra i nanum.
S.PHON: ħaɾu waʦu a matəfaɬ~ɮ tajra i nanum.
S.TRANSL: 連狗都掉到水中.
The dog fell into the water.

S.FORM: tayra satu i nanum i kalichantu nuya wacu kuya wawa.
S.PHON: tajra satu i nanum i kaɾiʦħantu nuja waʦu kuja wawa.
S.FORM: tayra satu i nanum i kalichantu nuya wacu kuya wawa.
S.PHON: tajra satu i nanum i kaɾiʦħantu nuja waʦu kuja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 他們到水中之後,那一隻狗就爬在小孩子的身上.
After falling into the water, the dog climbed onto the child.

S.FORM: ta talahekal cangra.
S.PHON: ta taɾaħəkaɾ ʦaŋra.
S.FORM: ta talahekal cangra.
S.PHON: ta taɾaħəkaɾ ʦaŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他們就到岸上去.
They toward the bank.

S.FORM: tahira cangra i hakal i a pasela.
S.PHON: taħira ʦaŋra i ħakaɾ i a pasəɾa.
S.FORM: tahira cangra i hakal i a pasela.
S.PHON: taħira ʦaŋra i ħakaɾ i a pasəɾa.
S.TRANSL: 他們到達岸上後,休息.
After they reached the bank, they took a rest.

S.FORM: maaraw nangra kuya ta tusaay a takula' ini kuya takula'.
S.PHON: maaraw naŋra kuja ta tusaaj a takuɾaʡ ini kuja takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: maaraw nangra kuya ta tusaay a takula' ini kuya takula'.
S.PHON: maaraw naŋra kuja ta tusaaj a takuɾaʡ ini kuja takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 他們在這裡看見了兩隻青蛙.
They saw two frogs here.

S.FORM: ca ka talacuwa sa'an ku falucu' nangra.
S.PHON: ʦa ka taɾaʦuwa saʡan ku faɾuʦuʡ naŋra.
S.FORM: ca ka talacuwa sa'an ku falucu' nangra.
S.PHON: ʦa ka taɾaʦuwa saʡan ku faɾuʦuʡ naŋra.
S.TRANSL: 「這個青蛙在這裡,沒有到別的地方!」他們心裡想.

TRANSL.notes: "(The frog) didn't go anywhere," they thought.

S.TRANSL: " didn't go anywhere," they thought.

S.FORM: nengnenghantu nira i aluman kiya takula' kuya 'al 'al kuya 'alu'.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħantu nira i aɾuman kija takuɾaʡ kuja ʡaɾ ʡaɾ kuja ʡaɾuʡ.
S.FORM: nengnenghantu nira i aluman kiya takula' kuya 'al 'al kuya 'alu'.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħantu nira i aɾuman kija takuɾaʡ kuja ʡaɾ ʡaɾ kuja ʡaɾuʡ.
S.TRANSL: 他們看見很多青蛙在河床上.
They saw many frogs in the river.

S.FORM: salipahak satu ku falucu' a nangra na nu i.
S.PHON: saɾipaħak satu ku faɾuʦuʡ a naŋra na nu i.
S.FORM: salipahak satu ku falucu' a nangra na nu i.
S.PHON: saɾipaħak satu ku faɾuʦuʡ a naŋra na nu i.
S.TRANSL: 他心中感到非常高興.
They felt very happy.

S.FORM: ya i a a matira aca ca'aytu ka rufuen aku kisu hantu nira kuya takula' kuya alumanay a takula'.
S.PHON: ja i a a matira aʦa ʦaʡajtu ka rufuən aku kisu ħantu nira kuja takuɾaʡ kuja aɾumanaj a takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: ya i a a matira aca ca'aytu ka rufuen aku kisu hantu nira kuya takula' kuya alumanay a takula'.
S.PHON: ja i a a matira aʦa ʦaʡajtu ka rufuən aku kisu ħantu nira kuja takuɾaʡ kuja aɾumanaj a takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 「如果是這樣的話我就不要把你們關起來.」
"If so, I will not imprison you."

S.FORM: a miliyas a minukay atu ya wacu.
S.PHON: a miɾijas a minukaj atu ja waʦu.
S.FORM: a miliyas a minukay atu ya wacu.
S.PHON: a miɾijas a minukaj atu ja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 就和狗離開回家.

TRANSL.notes: (He) left and went home with the dog.

S.TRANSL: left and went home with the dog.
